textPlain: No io_uring explainer is complete without a comprehensive running list of all the vulnerabilities discovered (so far) and the consequent API and behavior changes. This one, unfortunately, has been static since 2020, which means it comes from the time when io_uring seemed like it might be a fairly OK idea, instead of the toxic waste spill it turned out to be.
All critical flaws seen so far have seen patches and fixes.
Also user namespaces have had a long list of vulnerabilities, but that's still better than running docker as root directly.
